query:
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name as user_name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  c.id as client_id,
  c.name as client_name,
  c.whatsappPhone,
  c.userId as client_userId
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'alvarorios79@hotmail.com';
